calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiffs' failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones, CSR#3689 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Continued To Feb-25-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs in Propria Persona are each sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/25/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)
